news.title: ‘Too early’ to talk IPO, Redwood Materials’ incoming CFO says
news.snippet: The battery-recycling and energy-storage company has hired former Tesla finance chief Deepak Ahuja, reuniting him with former Tesla CTO JB Straubel.

news.title: Discord launches Nitro Rewards, giving subscribers access to the base tier of Xbox Game Pass for no extra cost
news.snippet: Discord's Nitro Rewards program will give Nitro subscribers access to Xbox Game Pass and discounts from Logitech, SteelSeries, and other gaming brands.

news.title: Meta acquires humanoid robotics firm Assured Robot Intelligence
news.snippet: Meta buys Assured Robot Intelligence to boost humanoid robots that anticipate human behavior. Team joins Superintelligence Labs.

news.title: Korea’s biggest manufacturers back Config, the TSMC of robot data
news.snippet: Instead of building robots themselves, the team is focused on a simpler goal — providing data that robots need to learn and operate.
